title: D1.8.7 Report on extended method and analysis documentation – the extension of the initial simple method documentation
author: Institute of Food Research
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
WP1.8 Extended Specification for Method Documentation  
 WP1.8 has developed an extended specification for method documentation. In addition to the general Method Indicator (linked to the EuroFIR method thesaurus) reported for a compositional value, the Method Specification entity includes details of key method steps and laboratory performance. This report outlines the extended analytical method specification.
steps_raw:
